svg.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Reusable across projects · Interoperable with QA and Scrum Master agents · Traceability-by-construction discipline

g.text: v1.0 · engineering-grade documentation · polish in Figma for board use
PII redaction on ingest · verbatim quotes preserved encrypted
Lifecycle: draft → reviewed → sealed → changed → retired
Per-artifact trace ID propagates to peers
Every artifact is written with upstream + downstream links populated. No link → no seal → no downstream consumption. Non-negotiable.
MCP LAYER · TOOL ALLOWLIST PER PROJECT
Hints, not decisions — SM agent owns final
Per-artifact span tree from elicit to seal
Missing link is a defect, not a warning
PII redactor on ingest · Vault secrets
Stateless pods · state in Postgres + S3
Haiku/Sonnet split keeps unit cost stable
S3-compatible object store for raw sources
TYPICAL FLOW · INPUT → SEALED CONTRACT → DOWNSTREAM HANDOFF
feedback loop · defects + clarifications enrich elicitor scaffolding
